title: Add test coverage for memory/embeddings.py pure math functions
description: memory/embeddings.py contains pure math functions (cosine_similarity, dot_similarity, serialize_f32, deserialize_f32, batch_similarities) with zero test coverage. These are used throughout the deduplication and similarity search pipeline. The functions require only numpy — no ML model or network access needed. A regression in serialize/deserialize would silently corrupt all stored embeddings.
requirements: tests/test_embeddings.py covers cosine_similarity, dot_similarity, serialize_f32, deserialize_f32, and batch_similarities
Tests do NOT import or invoke embed_text / embed_texts (those require fastembed model download)
No network access or API keys required
context: memory/embeddings.py line 77 also uses Optional[float] from typing instead of float | None — fix that convention violation as a drive-by when writing tests.
